About the Teacher

Meet Your Math Mentor

A passionate educator dedicated to making mathematics accessible, enjoyable, and results-driven for every student.

I believe every student can excel in mathematics with the right guidance, patience, and structured approach. My goal is not just to teach math, but to build confidence and a love for problem-solving that lasts a lifetime.

MT
Mr. M. Tharindu
Senior Mathematics Teacher

Qualifications

  • B.Sc. in Mathematics (Honours)
  • Postgraduate Diploma in Education
  • 10+ Years Teaching Experience

Syllabuses Covered

  • Local O/L & A/L
  • Cambridge IGCSE & A/AS Level
  • Edexcel IGCSE & IAL
  • Pearson Edexcel

Teaching Approach

  • Concept-based learning
  • Step-by-step problem solving
  • Regular progress assessments
  • Personalized attention

Achievements

  • 95% pass rate in O/L Mathematics
  • Multiple A* results in IGCSE
  • Top scores in A/L Combined Maths
  • Awarded Best Teacher 2023

Teaching Method

Why Students Excel With Our Approach

Our teaching methodology combines conceptual clarity with strategic exam preparation, ensuring students not only understand math but also excel in exams.

Proven Track Record

Years of experience with consistent A* and A results across all syllabuses.

Personalized Approach

Each student receives individual attention and a customized learning plan.

Exam-Focused Strategy

Targeted past paper practice and exam techniques for maximum marks.

Flexible Learning

Choose between online or physical classes with flexible scheduling options.

How to Enroll

01

Contact Us

Reach out via WhatsApp, phone, or our enrollment form.

02

Free Assessment

We evaluate the student's current level and learning needs.

03

Choose a Class

Select the most suitable class format and schedule.

04

Start Learning

Begin your journey to math excellence with structured guidance.

Start Your Journey
